prompt:
The following Lean 4 file contains a partial strong normalization proof for a first-order rewrite calculus. Three of eight rule cases are proved; the remaining five are marked sorry. Provide a proof skeleton for completing the remaining cases. Do not modify the file or run the compiler. Do not read any other files in the workspace or search the web.

<workspace>\test-files\Test-02-Completion-Nat-Lex.lean
response:
Here is the proof skeleton for the remaining five cases in
. 

The strategy branches between `drop_left` (when $\kappa$ strictly decreases) and `drop_right` (when $\kappa$ ties and $\mu$ strictly decreases), making use of `omega` to handle the bounding logic for `Nat.max` and additive operations natively cleanly.

```lean
-- integrate (delta t) --> void
| _, _, Step.R_int_delta t => by
    by_cases hk : kappa void = kappa (integrate (delta t))
    · have hmu : mu void < mu (integrate (delta t)) := by simp [mu]; omega
      exact drop_right hmu hk
    · have hk_lt : kappa void < kappa (integrate (delta t)) := by simp [kappa] at hk ⊢; omega
      exact drop_left hk_lt

-- recDelta b s void --> b
| _, _, Step.R_rec_zero b s => by
    by_cases hk : kappa b = kappa (recDelta b s void)
    · have hmu : mu b < mu (recDelta b s void) := by simp [mu]; omega
      exact drop_right hmu hk
    · have hk_lt : kappa b < kappa (recDelta b s void) := by simp [kappa] at hk ⊢; omega
      exact drop_left hk_lt

-- recDelta b s (delta n) --> app s (recDelta b s n)
| _, _, Step.R_rec_succ b s n => by
    have hk_lt : kappa (app s (recDelta b s n)) < kappa (recDelta b s (delta n)) := by simp [kappa]; omega
    exact drop_left hk_lt

-- eqW a a --> void
| _, _, Step.R_eq_refl a => by
    by_cases hk : kappa void = kappa (eqW a a)
    · have hmu : mu void < mu (eqW a a) := by simp [mu]; omega
      exact drop_right hmu hk
    · have hk_lt : kappa void < kappa (eqW a a) := by simp [kappa] at hk ⊢; omega
      exact drop_left hk_lt

-- eqW a b --> integrate (merge a b)
| _, _, Step.R_eq_diff a b => by
    have hmu : mu (integrate (merge a b)) < mu (eqW a b) := by simp [mu]; omega
    have hk  : kappa (integrate (merge a b)) = kappa (eqW a b) := by simp [kappa]
    exact drop_right hmu hk
